tools.name: git_diff_unstaged
tools.description: Shows changes in working directory not yet staged

tools.name: git_diff_staged
tools.description: Shows changes that are staged for commit

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Shows differences between branches or commits

target.description: Target branch or commit to compare with

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Adds file contents to the staging area

files.description: Array of file paths to stage

max_count.description: Maximum number of commits to show (default: 10)

start_point.description: Starting point for the new branch

tools.name: git_show
tools.description: Shows the contents of a commit

revision.description: The revision (commit hash, branch name, tag) to show

repo_path.description: Path to directory to initialize git repo

tools.name: git_stash_pop
tools.description: Applies and removes a single stashed state

tools.name: git_stash_apply
tools.description: Applies a single stashed state without removing it
